response.overview: The documentary 'Mulheres em Movimento' is a record of a spatio-temporal snapshot of the culture of the city of Santa Maria. Through the trajectories of Daiane Diniz, Gisele Guimarães, Paola Matos, and Tiane Tambara, the documentary interweaves their individual professional journeys, the complexity of the relationship between their personal lives and artistic routines, and the collective construction of an important chapter in the cultural history of Santa Maria: the consolidation of the 'Mulheres em Movimento' project.
response.title: Mulheres em Movimento
